b:Tef0e,<div class="specification">
<p>The drawings show the development of an immature neuron in a rat.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">Describe the process taking place.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">Outline the possible changes to this neuron that could happen during the subsequent development of the nervous system.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p style="text-align: left;">Suggest how the plasticity of the brain can benefit humans.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>c:T52e,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. «the process shows» the growth of an axon/dendrites/extensions ✔</p>
<p>b. differentiation/forming a specialized neuron ✔</p>
<p>c. responding to a chemical stimulus ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. the neuron forms synapses/multiple connections «with other neurons»<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>a neural network forms<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>more dendrites ✔<br/><br/>b. some synapses/connections in excess of what is required<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>some synapses/connections not used ✔</p>
<p>c. it could be removed by neural pruning/apoptosis ✔</p>
<p>d. it could migrate to another place ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. allows brain to change/adjust/make new synapses throughout lifetime/with experience/learning ✔</p>
<p>b. allows regeneration of neurons after brain trauma<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>allows other area «of the brain» to take over a function after brain trauma ✔ </p>
<p>c. selective advantage/increases chance of survival ✔</p>
<p> </p>
<p><em>OWTTE</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/a/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","a"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"18N.3.SL.TZ0.5"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"18N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","a-1-neural-development"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$c"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
